hero.title: Fashion Lookbook Mockup
hero.description: Transform your outfits and collections into fashion lookbook visuals with AI. Generate clean, editorial-style pages that showcase full looks, details, and mood without manually designing every layout.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Describe your collection or upload your looks

steps.title: Define your collection or series
steps.description: Describe the collection, theme, or set of looks you want to present, including key pieces, season, and overall mood.

steps.title: Choose lookbook style and structure
steps.description: Specify the lookbook direction—for example, "minimal editorial spread", "collage-style streetwear lookbook", or "clean ecommerce look grid".

steps.title: Generate AI-powered lookbook mockups
steps.description: The workflow creates lookbook-style images that arrange your looks in a cohesive visual narrative, ready for campaigns and online presentation.

steps.title: Refine pages and export for use
steps.description: Select your favorite layouts, iterate if needed, then export assets for landing pages, digital lookbooks, PDFs, and social content.

whoIsFor.title: For fashion brands and visual storytellers
whoIsFor.subtitle: Ideal for teams presenting collections, capsules, or seasonal edits.

items.question: What is the Fashion Lookbook Mockup workflow?
items.answer: Fashion Lookbook Mockup is an AI workflow that generates lookbook-style visuals for fashion collections, campaigns, and styled looks. It helps you create editorial-feeling pages without building every layout by hand.

items.question: What kind of input should I prepare?
items.answer: You can start from descriptions of your looks or collections, and optionally provide reference images or product shots. The clearer the theme and mood, the better the results.

items.question: Can I control the aesthetic of the lookbook?
items.answer: Yes. You can describe your desired aesthetic—minimal, luxury, streetwear, vintage, etc.—and mention layout preferences like grids, full-bleed images, or collage compositions.

items.question: Where can I use the generated lookbook visuals?
items.answer: You can use them on campaign landing pages, brand sites, digital lookbooks, PDFs for buyers, and social feeds to tell a cohesive collection story.

items.question: Will this replace full layout design?
items.answer: Think of it as a fast way to explore and produce strong starting points. You can use the outputs directly or refine them further in your design tools to match strict brand guidelines.

items.question: How are credits and pricing handled?
items.answer: Each generation consumes credits based on image creation steps. It’s optimized so you can try multiple lookbook directions before deciding which ones to keep.
